mapper.sql: history_id, task_id, incident_id, assignment_id, dispatch_request_id, agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, site_id, routing_decision_id, event_type, status, attempt_no, task_dispatch_attempt_no, reason, error_code, error_message, next_attempt_at, runtime_backoff_until, worker_id, claim_until, payload_json, occurred_at, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_attempt_history () values ( #{record.historyId}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.incidentId}, #{record.assignmentId}, #{record.dispatchRequestId}, #{record.agentId}, #{record.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{record.agentSessionId}, #{record.siteId}, #{record.routingDecisionId}, #{record.eventType}, #{record.status}, #{record.attemptNo}, #{record.taskDispatchAttemptNo}, #{record.reason}, #{record.errorCode}, #{record.errorMessage}, #{record.nextAttemptAt}, #{record.runtimeBackoffUntil}, #{record.workerId}, #{record.claimUntil}, coalesce(cast(#{record.payloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.createdAt} )
mapper.select: select from dispatch_attempt_history order by occurred_at desc, created_at desc limit #{limit}
